features: REAL WILD BLUEBERRIES: Our crunchy organic freeze dried blueberries (V. myrtillus), contain antioxidants at a level that's 3-5 times higher than that of cultivated blueberries. They're high in dietary fiber and a source of vitamin E. Freeze dried blueberry tastes sweet, so there's no need to add any sugar nor apple juice to our dried blueberries.

SEE THE DIFFERENCE: We freeze-dry our organic blueberries, which is a good method for preserving the nutrients and taste. Wild blueberries contain several times more flavonoids and four times as much anthocyanin as cultivated blueberries. Did you know that our dried blueberries plump up nicely in yogurt or a smoothie.

DELICIOUS FRUIT SNACK FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY: A spoonful of LOOV's dried blueberries is a truly fruitful experience! Get the berries of Finnish forests in a simple packet - just dried bilberries and nothing else!

GROWN WILD IN NORDIC FORESTS: We handpick our berries from organic Nordic forests. 65% of Finland is covered with forests and it has the highest number of organic forest berry areas in the world. In mid-summer, there are 19 hours of daylight in southern Finland, and in the northern Arctic Circle region, it never gets dark. This abundance of light causes the formation of antioxidant compounds in organic wild blueberries grown in Northern countries.

ADD TO MEALS FOR A BURST OF FLAVOR: You can enjoy our freeze dried blueberries as a worry-free snack, or add them to your smoothie, trail mix, porridge, yogurt, cereal, muesli etc. Dried unsweetened blueberries make a great addition to your favorite recipe, offering a burst of blueberry flavor.
description: Product Description All Our Berries Come from Nordic Forests Northern conditions are characterized by long days, featuring an abundance of light and cool temperatures during the growing season, which gives our dried wild berries an intense flavour and makes them rich in nutrients. Have You Ever Tasted Freeze Dried Wild Blueberries? Good Dried Fruit Snack for the Whole Family Our organic freeze dried blueberries are a crunchy, minimally processed, tasty snack for children without added sugar . Organic blueberries are a good source of antioxidants and fibre . Our Secret Ingredient is Freeze-drying To give you the maximum amount of Nordic goodness, our blueberries are freeze-dried, which is a good method for preserving the nutrients, taste and colour . It leaves the berries really light and puffy, almost melting in your mouth with an explosion of blueberry flavour. Our Blueberries are Packed with Antioxidants Wild European blueberries, aka bilberries, contain 4 times more antioxidants than cultivated blueberries. Our freeze-dried fruit is good for snacking , ideal for nibbling or cooking . Brought to You Direct from Nordic Forests Our handpicked, wild-crafted organic bilberries are gathered from organic forests in Estonia, Finland and/or Sweden. Wild Nordic organic bilberries contain, in addition to high levels of antioxidants, a good amount of vitamin A, vitamin E, carotene and dietary fibre . Take a Tongue Test! The easiest and quickest way to find out is to perform a colouring-test: our blueberries proudly stain your hands, teeth and tongue deep blue or purple. Cultivated berries will just mark you a bit. How Do You Know You Have the Real Thing? There is a real difference between a blueberry and blueberry, and not all blueberries are completely the same. Wild Nordic organic bilberries contain, in addition to high levels of antioxidants, a good amount of vitamin A , vitamin E , carotene and dietary fibre . Our organic freeze dried fruit, aka bilberries (V. myrtillus), grow in wild forests and are not cultivated. Our organic dried blueberries are blue inside and out. Cultivated blueberries have white flesh. Our dried berries taste more sour, intense and tangy, whereas cultivated blueberries have just mildly fragrant flesh. It's not Just a Delicious Snack... ... but Good for Cooking as Well! You are most welcome to enjoy our organic freeze dried blueberries as a snack or be inventive and add them to your favourite recipes . It takes your food to another level and surprises your family with a burst of blueberry flavour. TIP: Make sure to properly seal the package after using to keep the berries from clumping and to preserve the quality of nutrients .
